name: python3-gridfs
title: python3-gridfs
summary: Python3 implementation of GridFS for MongoDB
description:
Python3 implementation of GridFS for MongoDB
GridFS is a storage specification for large objects in MongoDB.
The Python3 gridfs module is an implementation based
on the pymongo module. It provides a file-like interface.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-gridfs because Python3 implementation of GridFS for MongoDB.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-gridfs as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-gridfs with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-gridfs --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
